arts.ttl: Former RFEF chief ‘threat to kill’ Lamine Yamal’s father over Spain allegiance
arts.sum: Lamine Yamal has risen to become a star for Barcelona and Spain in the last 12 months. The 17-year-old was selected in Luis de la Fuente’s squad for UEFA Euro 2024 last summer, and despite not turning 17 until the day before their final win over England, he was central to the title. He is […] The post Former RFEF chief ‘threat to kill’ Lamine Yamal’s father over Spain allegiance appeared first on Football España.

arts.ttl: What to look out for as Barca take on Osasuna in La Liga
arts.sum: Barcelona head into the match still unbeaten in 2025 but will be eyeing revenge on Osasuna who handed Flick’s side a first defeat of the season back in September with a shock 4-2 win. Osasuna striker Ante Budimir scored twice in the 4-2 win and numbers Barcelona as one of his favourite victims in La Liga along with Girona, Cadiz, and Granada.

arts.ttl: ‘That’s why he’s No.1’ - Hansi Flick hails ‘fantastic’ Szczesny
arts.sum: But Szczesny has more than proven he was the right man for the job, and his coach was full of praise for his performance in Lisbon in a press conference on Friday and revealed the process behind making the decision to make Tek the starting shot-stopper. The Pole had to wait his turn after coming out of retirement but was given the job at the beginning of the new year, and Hansi Flick’s decision to make Szczesny the number one goalkeeper over Iñaki Peña was controversial to say the least at the time.
